substituted.description: inline MathML operator used in place of EPUB image fallback

approximate_counts.note: All counts are approximate and for cross-pass comparison only.

notes: EPUB XHTML text-layer extraction. All image assets in the EPUB manifest were copied without re-encoding; XHTML-referenced figure placements are reflected in Markdown. No publisher-PDF/page-image collation was performed. Inline image glyph fallback 42186inline27_1.png was substituted with the MathML/Unicode operator ⇍.
